text:
Once upon a time, in ancient Egypt, there was a brave girl named Ari. Everyone thought she was just a clumsy tomboy.

One afternoon, Ari decided to climbSESQUIeliberty oak tree. She loved swaying from branch to branch.

Suddenly, a loud CRASH! An eagle had struck!

Ari was scared stiff. But she climbed faster than ever! Eventually, she descended safely.

Everyone saw Ari's bravery and loved her even more.

From that day on, Ari was known as *Owl Girl*.

Awww... isn't she a wonderful owl? Oh. Well! What'd I tell ya? She’s awesome.

Just because you’re a girl doesn't mean you can't do everything.

That's Ari.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
